scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/tokens && npm run build --workspace=packages/core && npm run build --workspace=packages/react
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/tokens && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/core && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/react
scripts.pack:dry-run: npm --cache .npm-cache pack --dry-run --workspace=packages/tokens && npm --cache .npm-cache pack --dry-run --workspace=packages/core && npm --cache .npm-cache pack --dry-run --workspace=packages/theme && npm --cache .npm-cache pack --dry-run --workspace=packages/react
scripts.release:check: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run pack:dry-run
scripts.publish:all: npm run release:check && npm run publish:tokens && npm run publish:core && npm run publish:theme && npm run publish:react
